name: Nutty Motorcars
short_description: Nutty Motorcars is a classic video game with a new point of view. Up to eight players on a single screen can battle it out in these crazy races. Jumps, bridges, tunnels and many more obstacles. Discover the 15 circuits available in the full version and race on them with 10 different vehicles.
detailed_description:
Nutty Motorcars is a classic video game with a new point of view. Play alone or with more friends, in a 4 players (up to 8 players) on a single screen can battle it out in these crazy races. Jumps, bridges, tunnels and many more obstacles. Throw your enemies giant hammers, mines, sweep them with dynamite, or just collide with them to make them lose time. Avoid going off the road and slippery areas. Use the turbo to overtake your opponents and repair your car by collecting power-ups. Discover the 15 circuits available in the full version and race on them with 10 different vehicles.

Note: You can play the game with the keyboard, but to play multiplayer local you need an aditional controller.
